name: Deploy and Interact with a Contract
query: Deploy a simple counter contract on Radius testnet, read the initial count, increment it, and read the count again to verify
context: User wants to deploy and interact with a minimal contract on Radius testnet. The agent should use general EVM tooling (cast, web3.py, or viem) and must not require radius-wallet-py or radius-wallet-ts.
expected_behavior: Chooses a valid general-tooling path (cast, web3.py, or viem)
Deploys contract bytecode on testnet and captures tx hash
Waits for deployment receipt and obtains contract address
Reads initial count via contract call
Submits increment transaction via contract write
Reads count again and verifies it increased by 1
Returns contract address and explorer URLs
Never logs or displays the private key
Does not install, require, or mandate radius-wallet-py/radius-wallet-ts
success_criteria: A valid non-Radius-wallet tooling path is used (cast OR web3.py OR viem)
No step requires radius-wallet-py or radius-wallet-ts
Deployment produces a contract address from receipt output
Initial and final count reads are both performed
increment() write is confirmed by receipt before final read
Contract address and explorer links are reported
Private key is never printed, logged, or hardcoded
All operations target testnet by default
